title: Aixoom Rubber Jar Opener Pads Set of 4, Round Heat-insulated Non-Slip Gripper Pads for Jars, Kitchen Tool for Easy Opening (Circle)
description:
Effortless Opening: Specially designed circular rubber jar opener gripper pad with textured ensuring a secure hold while opening containers, effortless opening of stubborn jars, bottles, and lids
Perfect Size: The jar opener gripper pad is 4.92 in / 12.5cm in diameter, so it's adaptable to various sizes of jars, bottle caps, and lids. Thin and soft texture ensuring a snug fit for most lids
Durable & Reusable: Crafted from high-quality rubber, these jar openers are designed for enduring use. Their easy-to-clean feature ensures hassle-free maintenance, allowing for repeated reliable use
Great for Limited Hand Strength: Designed to minimize strain and discomfort, these jar openers top rated for seniors offer individuals with limited hand strength a remarkably easier and pain-free experience when opening lids
Versatile Kitchen Pads: Beyond opening jars, these round rubber jar gripper pads serve as cup mats, preventing cup or table scratches, and as heat-resistant shields, safeguarding kitchen counters from damage
reviews_5s:
They open jars and caps much easier than the hand held ones. Less expensive , less effort and they last a long time. Perfect.They do the job well. Easy to use and get it openI’ve used these gripper pads for years and they work wonders on slippery jars and lids. I can’t open everything but almost everything with them. I am old and not strong so this is something about how handy they are. I’m also not rich so appreciate their inexpensive nature.These pads are thinner than the old one I had but work great and are a great price. Ver satisfied with the purchase.Like the colors and opens jars well.Really like them
Works great
Thinner ones are much easier to use and gripRubber jar openers are something everyone needs in their kitchen!!! Opens any jar right up!
For someone without tons of strength, or sore fingers or arthritis, it’s terrific!I have looked for something like this in stores, no luck.just what I needed!These work well to open any size food container with a screw-off top. And you get 4–a good deal.
reviews_1s: They did not work well for me. Kept popping up and off vDoesn't grip just slipsThe pads are rubbery, but they are smooth. rather than textured. Thus far we have tried to open three jars and have been unable to each time.Cute color but doesn’t workthese openers are super thin and cheap. I am sure they would rip after a couple of uses. Don't waste your money.
